---
applyTo: "src/content/**/*.ts,src/app/**/*.tsx,src/components/**/*.tsx"
description: "Use when editing user-facing Portuguese copy."
---

- Preserve Portuguese (pt-BR) orthography in all user-facing text.
- Keep accents and cedilla exactly as intended (ã, á, â, é, ê, í, ó, ô, õ, ú, ç).
- Do not normalize copy text to ASCII.
- Before finishing, review headings, CTAs, metadata, and testimonials for missing diacritics.
